During the [[New Sith Wars]], well before the [[Light and Darkness War]] that ended the conflict, a '''battle''' occurred on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Almas]]. A Jedi force drove the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Rivan]] from his fortress on [[Almas]]—although the fortress was only partially destroyed. The Jedi logged the system and christened it [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin]], but it was soon forgotten until its rediscovery in [[232 BBY/Legends|232 BBY]].<ref name="Living" />
